controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (all india financial institutions - treatment of wilful defaulters and large defaulters) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
Short title and commencement
(1) These directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial
Institutions - Treatment of Wilful Defaulters and Large Defaulters) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (all india financial institutions - treatment of wilful defaulters and large defaulters) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force with immediate effect
controls.control_description: (2) These directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into force with immediate effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to all india financial institutions (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'aifis' and individually as a 'aifi'), viz
controls.control_description:
Applicability
(1) These Directions shall be applicable to All India Financial Institutions (hereinafter
collectively referred to as 'AIFIs' and individually as a 'AIFI'), viz., Export-Import
Bank of India (EXIM Bank), National Bank for Agriculture and Rural Development
(NABARD), National Housing Bank (NHB), Small Industries Development Bank
of India (SIDBI), and National Bank for Financing Infrastructure and Development
(NaBFID).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to all india financial institutions (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'aifis' and individually as a 'aifi'), viz

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to all entities regulated by the reserve bank, irrespective of whether they fall within the definition of 'lender' as provided in these directio
controls.control_description:
(2) The restrictions on further financial accommodation to wilful defaulters and
provisions regarding large defaulters contained in these Directions, shall apply to
all entities regulated by the Reserve Bank, irrespective of whether they fall within
the definition of 'lender' as provided in these Directions or not.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to all entities regulated by the reserve bank, irrespective of whether they fall within the definition of 'lender' as provided in these directio

controls.control_objective: To ensure be comprised of members who are part of the identification committee
controls.control_description:
Definitions
(1) In these Directions, the following definitions shall apply, unless the context
otherwise requires:
Explanation: The Review Committee shall not be comprised of members who
are part of the Identification Committee.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be comprised of members who are part of the identification committee

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as suit filed if any application, appeal or execution is pending in continuation of the original recovery proceedings
controls.control_description:
Explanation 1: An account shall be treated as suit filed if any application,
appeal or execution is pending in continuation of the original recovery
proceedings.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as suit filed if any application, appeal or execution is pending in continuation of the original recovery proceedings

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed to include accounts in which proceedings under the securitisation and reconstruction of financial assets and enforcement of security interes
controls.control_description:
Explanation 2: Suit filed accounts shall be deemed to include accounts in
which proceedings under the Securitisation and Reconstruction of Financial
Assets and Enforcement of Security Interest Act, 2002 or any other
proceedings for recovery of the dues from the borrower or any other person
liable to make payment of a debt under Acts governing co-operative societies
are initiated and pending, and shall include the account of a debtor against
whom resolution or liquidation proceedings have been initiated and are
continuing.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed to include accounts in which proceedings under the securitisation and reconstruction of financial assets and enforcement of security interes

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean one who has availed credit facility from an aifi
controls.control_description: (i) "borrower" shall mean one who has availed credit facility from an AIFI;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean one who has availed credit facility from an aifi

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean any fund based or non-fund-based facility, including off- balance sheet items like derivatives, guarantees and letters of credit, which an aifi h
controls.control_description:
(ii) "credit facility" shall mean any fund based or non-fund-based facility, including
off- balance sheet items like derivatives, guarantees and letters of credit, which
an AIFI has extended to the borrower.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean any fund based or non-fund-based facility, including off- balance sheet items like derivatives, guarantees and letters of credit, which an aifi h

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean a company that has been granted a certificate of registration under section 5 of the credit information companies (regulation) act, 2005
controls.control_description:
(iii) "credit information company" (CIC) shall mean a company that has been
granted a certificate of registration under Section 5 of the Credit Information
Companies (Regulation) Act, 2005.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean a company that has been granted a certificate of registration under section 5 of the credit information companies (regulation) act, 2005

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning assigned to it in the reserve bank of india (all india financial institutions - resolution of stressed assets) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
(iv) "default" shall have the same meaning assigned to it in the Reserve Bank of
India (All India Financial Institutions - Resolution of Stressed Assets)
Directions, 2025
<image>
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning assigned to it in the reserve bank of india (all india financial institutions - resolution of stressed assets) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean the director of a company which was classified as a large defaulter / wilful defaulter and who was associated with the company at the time when t
controls.control_description:
(v) "director" shall mean the director of a company which was classified as a large
defaulter / wilful defaulter and who was associated with the company at the
time when the acts of omission or commission by the company / its directors
led to the default.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean the director of a company which was classified as a large defaulter / wilful defaulter and who was associated with the company at the time when t

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the meaning assigned to it under the companies act, 2013
controls.control_description:
(vi) "director identification number (DIN)" shall have the meaning assigned to it
under the Companies Act, 2013.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the meaning assigned to it under the companies act, 2013

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean and includes the under- noted occurrences:
controls.control_description: (vii) "diversion of funds" shall mean and includes the under- noted occurrences:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean and includes the under- noted occurrences:

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean a person / entity who has guaranteed the credit facility
controls.control_description: (viii) "guarantor" shall mean a person / entity who has guaranteed the credit facility.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean a person / entity who has guaranteed the credit facility

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean the committee constituted by an aifi for identifying a wilful defaulter and shall comprise of a whole-time director other than the managing direc
controls.control_description:
(ix) "identification committee" shall mean the committee constituted by an AIFI for
identifying a wilful defaulter and shall comprise of a Whole-Time Director other
than the Managing Director and Chief Executive Officer (MD & CEO) / CEO or
equivalent official as chairperson and two senior officials as members, not
more than two ranks below the chairperson of the committee.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean the committee constituted by an aifi for identifying a wilful defaulter and shall comprise of a whole-time director other than the managing direc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be part of the review <image> committee if the post of md & ceo / ceo or equivalent official is vacant
controls.control_description:
In cases where
there is only one Whole-Time Director other than the MD & CEO/ CEO or
equivalent official, such Whole-Time Director may be part of the review
<image>
committee if the post of MD & CEO / CEO or equivalent official is vacant.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be part of the review <image> committee if the post of md & ceo / ceo or equivalent official is vacant

controls.control_objective: To ensure chair the identification committee, with two senior officials as members, not more than one rank below the chairperson of the committee
controls.control_description:
In
such cases an official one rank below the Whole-Time Director may chair the
identification committee, with two senior officials as members, not more than
one rank below the chairperson of the committee.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to chair the identification committee, with two senior officials as members, not more than one rank below the chairperson of the committee

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the meaning assigned to it under the companies act, 2013
controls.control_description:
(x) "independent director" shall have the meaning assigned to it under the
Companies Act, 2013.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the meaning assigned to it under the companies act, 2013

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean a defaulter with an outstanding amount of ₹1 crore and above, and -
controls.control_description:
(xi) "large defaulter" shall mean a defaulter with an outstanding amount of ₹1 crore
and above, and -
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean a defaulter with an outstanding amount of ₹1 crore and above, and -

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean any of the following entities which has granted a credit facility to the borrower:
controls.control_description:
(xii) "lender" shall mean any of the following entities which has granted a credit
facility to the borrower:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean any of the following entities which has granted a credit facility to the borrower:

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean a director nominated by a lender, a regulatory authority, or the central or a state government
controls.control_description:
(xiii) "nominee director" shall mean a director nominated by a lender, a regulatory
authority, or the Central or a State Government.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean a director nominated by a lender, a regulatory authority, or the central or a state government

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean a person who has been named as such in a prospectus or is identified by the company in the annual return, and
controls.control_description:
(xiv) "promoter" shall mean a person who has been named as such in a prospectus
or is identified by the company in the annual return, and
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean a person who has been named as such in a prospectus or is identified by the company in the annual return, and

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean the committee constituted by an aifi for the purpose of reviewing the proposal of the identification committee and shall comprise of the whole-ti
controls.control_description:
(xv) "review committee" shall mean the committee constituted by an AIFI for the
purpose of reviewing the proposal of the Identification Committee and shall
comprise of the Whole-Time Director who is the MD & CEO / CEO or
equivalent official of the AIFI as chairperson and two independent directors or
non-executive directors or equivalent officials as members.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean the committee constituted by an aifi for the purpose of reviewing the proposal of the identification committee and shall comprise of the whole-ti

controls.control_objective: To ensure be constituted with a whole-time director in place of md & ceo / ceo or equivalent official
controls.control_description:
Where the post of
MD & CEO / CEO or equivalent official is vacant, the Review Committee shall
be constituted with a Whole-Time Director in place of MD & CEO / CEO or
equivalent official.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be constituted with a whole-time director in place of md & ceo / ceo or equivalent official

controls.control_objective: To ensure be chaired by independent directors or non-executive directors or equivalent officials
controls.control_description:
In such cases, Review Committee shall be chaired by
independent directors or non-executive directors or equivalent officials.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be chaired by independent directors or non-executive directors or equivalent officials

controls.control_objective: To ensure frame a board approved policy for the implementation of these directions, which shall inter alia include the following:
controls.control_description:
Policy for Implementation of these Directions
An AIFI shall frame a Board approved policy for the implementation of these
Directions, which shall inter alia include the following:
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to frame a board approved policy for the implementation of these directions, which shall inter alia include the following:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be published
controls.control_description:
(iii) non-discriminatory criteria based on which the photographs of persons
classified and declared as wilful defaulter shall be published;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be published

controls.control_objective: To ensure identify and classify a person as a 'wilful defaulter' by following the procedure enumerated in these directions
controls.control_description:
Mechanism for Identification and Classification of Wilful Defaulters
(1) An AIFI shall identify and classify a person as a 'wilful defaulter' by following
the procedure enumerated in these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to identify and classify a person as a 'wilful defaulter' by following the procedure enumerated in these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made keeping in view the track record of the borrowers and should not be decided on the basis of isolated transactions / incidents
controls.control_description:
The identification of the wilful default
should be made keeping in view the track record of the borrowers and should not be
decided on the basis of isolated transactions / incidents.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made keeping in view the track record of the borrowers and should not be decided on the basis of isolated transactions / incidents

controls.control_objective: To ensure be intentional, deliberate, calculated and meeting the conditions set out in paragraph 3 (1) (xviii) above
controls.control_description:
(2) The default to be categorised as wilful must be intentional, deliberate,
calculated and meeting the conditions set out in paragraph 3 (1) (xviii) above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be intentional, deliberate, calculated and meeting the conditions set out in paragraph 3 (1) (xviii) above

controls.control_objective: To ensure be examined by an identification committee
controls.control_description:
(3) The evidence of wilful default shall be examined by an Identification
Committee.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be examined by an identification committee

controls.control_objective: To ensure issue a show-cause notice to borrower / guarantor / promoter / director / persons who are in charge and responsible for the management of the affairs
controls.control_description:
(4) If the Identification Committee is satisfied that an event of wilful default has
occurred, it shall issue a show-cause notice to borrower / guarantor / promoter /
director / persons who are in charge and responsible for the management of the
affairs of the entity, and call for the submissions from them within 21 days of issuance
of show cause notice.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to issue a show-cause notice to borrower / guarantor / promoter / director / persons who are in charge and responsible for the management of the affairs

controls.control_objective: To ensure disclose to them all materials and information on which show cause notice is based
controls.control_description:
The AIFI shall disclose to them all materials and information
on which show cause notice is based.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to disclose to them all materials and information on which show cause notice is based

controls.control_objective: To ensure who were associated with the company / entity at the time when the acts of omission or commission by the company / entity led to the default
controls.control_description:
Explanation: Director (s) / persons who are in charge and responsible for the
management of the affairs of the entity means who were associated with the company
/ entity at the time when the acts of omission or commission by the company / entity
led to the default.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to who were associated with the company / entity at the time when the acts of omission or commission by the company / entity led to the default

controls.control_objective: To ensure make a proposal to the review committee for classification as a wilful defaulter by explaining the reasons in writing
controls.control_description:
(5) After considering the submissions and where satisfied, the Identification
Committee shall make a proposal to the Review Committee for classification as a
wilful defaulter by explaining the reasons in writing.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make a proposal to the review committee for classification as a wilful defaulter by explaining the reasons in writing

controls.control_objective: To ensure thereafter be suitably advised about the proposal to classify them as wilful defaulter along with the reasons
controls.control_description:
(6) The borrower / guarantor / promoter / director / persons who are in charge and
responsible for the management of the affairs of the entity shall thereafter be suitably
advised about the proposal to classify them as wilful defaulter along with the reasons
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to thereafter be suitably advised about the proposal to classify them as wilful defaulter along with the reasons

controls.control_objective: To ensure examine the 'wilful default' aspect in all non-performing assets (npa) accounts with outstanding amount of ₹25 lakh and above or as may be notified by
controls.control_description:
Review of accounts for identification of wilful default
(1) An AIFI shall examine the 'wilful default' aspect in all Non-Performing Assets
(NPA) accounts with outstanding amount of ₹25 lakh and above or as may be notified
by Reserve Bank of India from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to examine the 'wilful default' aspect in all non-performing assets (npa) accounts with outstanding amount of ₹25 lakh and above or as may be notified by

controls.control_objective: To ensure complete the process of classification/ declaring the borrower as a wilful defaulter by following the mechanism set out in paragraph 5, within six mon
controls.control_description:
(2) If wilful default is observed in the internal preliminary screening, an AIFI shall
complete the process of classification/ declaring the borrower as a wilful defaulter by
following the mechanism set out in Paragraph 5, within six months of the account
being classified as NPA in accordance with the instructions regarding asset
classification contained in the Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial Institutions -
Income Recognition, Asset Classification and Provisioning) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to complete the process of classification/ declaring the borrower as a wilful defaulter by following the mechanism set out in paragraph 5, within six mon

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subsequently re-examined in terms of the board approved policy of the aifi at a periodicity as may be specified by the board
controls.control_description:
(3) In respect of accounts where 'wilful default' was not observed during the initial
examination as mentioned at sub-paragraphs (1) and (2), the aspects regarding 'wilful
default' shall be subsequently re-examined in terms of the Board approved policy of
the AIFI at a periodicity as may be specified by the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be subsequently re-examined in terms of the board approved policy of the aifi at a periodicity as may be specified by the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed to be associated
controls.control_description:
Explanation 2: If the wilful defaulter is a natural person, all entities in which he is
associated as promoter, or director, or as one in charge and responsible for the
management of the affairs of the entity shall be deemed to be associated.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed to be associated

controls.control_objective: To ensure take a view on restructuring such accounts based on their viability, without prejudice to the continuance of criminal proceedings against the erstwhil
controls.control_description:
Explanation 3: In cases where the existing promoters are replaced by new promoters
in terms of Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial Institutions - Resolution of
Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025 and the borrower company is totally delinked from
such erstwhile promoters/ management, lenders may take a view on restructuring
such accounts based on their viability, without prejudice to the continuance of criminal
proceedings against the erstwhile promoters/ management.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take a view on restructuring such accounts based on their viability, without prejudice to the continuance of criminal proceedings against the erstwhil

controls.control_objective: To ensure be without prejudice to the continuation of criminal proceedings against the wilful <image> defaulter
controls.control_description:
(ii) In cases where criminal proceedings have been initiated, removal of the name
of a wilful defaulter from the List of Wilful Defaulters (LWD) shall be without
prejudice to the continuation of criminal proceedings against the wilful
<image>
defaulter.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be without prejudice to the continuation of criminal proceedings against the wilful <image> defaulter

controls.control_objective: To ensure formulate a non- discriminatory board-approved policy that clearly sets out the criteria based on which the photographs of persons classified and decl
controls.control_description:
(2) Publishing of photographs of wilful defaulters - An AIFI shall formulate a non-
discriminatory board-approved policy that clearly sets out the criteria based on which
the photographs of persons classified and declared as wilful defaulter shall be
published.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to formulate a non- discriminatory board-approved policy that clearly sets out the criteria based on which the photographs of persons classified and decl

controls.control_objective: To ensure be implemented by an aifi in the case of any person / entity classified as wilful defaulter by any lender:
controls.control_description:
(3) Penal and other measures against wilful defaulters - The penal measures
mentioned below shall be implemented by an AIFI in the case of any person / entity
classified as wilful defaulter by any lender:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be implemented by an aifi in the case of any person / entity classified as wilful defaulter by any lender:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be granted by the aifi to the wilful defaulter or any entity with which the wilful defaulter is associated
controls.control_description:
(i) No additional credit facility shall be granted by the AIFI to the wilful defaulter
or any entity with which the wilful defaulter is associated.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be granted by the aifi to the wilful defaulter or any entity with which the wilful defaulter is associated

controls.control_objective: To ensure be effective for a period of one year after the name of the wilful defaulter has been removed from the list of wilful defaulters by the lenders
controls.control_description:
(ii) The bar on additional credit facility to the wilful defaulter or any entity with
which the wilful defaulter is associated shall be effective for a period of one
year after the name of the wilful defaulter has been removed from the List of
Wilful Defaulters by the lenders.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be effective for a period of one year after the name of the wilful defaulter has been removed from the list of wilful defaulters by the lenders

controls.control_objective: To ensure be granted by the aifi for floating of new ventures to the wilful defaulter or any entity with which the wilful defaulter is associated for a period o
controls.control_description:
(iii) No credit facility shall be granted by the AIFI for floating of new ventures to the
wilful defaulter or any entity with which the wilful defaulter is associated for a
period of five years after the name of wilful defaulter has been removed from
the List of Wilful Defaulters by the lenders.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be granted by the aifi for floating of new ventures to the wilful defaulter or any entity with which the wilful defaulter is associated for a period o

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as per the stipulations contained in the reserve bank of india (all india financial institutions - resolution of stressed assets) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
(iv) The restructuring of wilful defaulters or any entity with which a wilful defaulter
is associated shall be as per the stipulations contained in the Reserve Bank of
India (All India Financial Institutions - Resolution of Stressed Assets)
Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as per the stipulations contained in the reserve bank of india (all india financial institutions - resolution of stressed assets) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure cease to be applicable on the associated entities when they are no longer associated with the wilful defaulters
controls.control_description:
Provided that the penal provisions mentioned above shall cease to be applicable on
the associated entities when they are no longer associated with the wilful defaulters.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to cease to be applicable on the associated entities when they are no longer associated with the wilful defaulters

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a transparent mechanism for the entire process of identification of wilful defaulters so that the penal provisions are applied in a fair
controls.control_description:
Provision for a transparent mechanism
An AIFI shall put in place a transparent mechanism for the entire process of
identification of wilful defaulters so that the penal provisions are applied in a fair
manner and the scope for discretion is obviated.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place a transparent mechanism for the entire process of identification of wilful defaulters so that the penal provisions are applied in a fair

controls.control_objective: To ensure require their internal auditors to specifically look into adherence to instructions for classifying a borrower as a wilful defaulter
controls.control_description:
Role of Internal Audit
(1) An AIFI shall require their internal auditors to specifically look into adherence
to instructions for classifying a borrower as a wilful defaulter.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require their internal auditors to specifically look into adherence to instructions for classifying a borrower as a wilful defaulter

controls.control_objective: To ensure periodically review the cases of wilful default and recommend steps to be taken to prevent such occurrences and their early detection should these occ
controls.control_description:
(2) The Audit Committee of the AIFI shall periodically review the cases of wilful
default and recommend steps to be taken to prevent such occurrences and their early
detection should these occur.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to periodically review the cases of wilful default and recommend steps to be taken to prevent such occurrences and their early detection should these occ

controls.control_objective: To ensure focus on identifying root causes of wilful default and addressing deficiencies
controls.control_description:
The review shall focus on identifying root causes of
wilful default and addressing deficiencies, if any, in the wilful defaulter classification
process adopted by the AIFI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to focus on identifying root causes of wilful default and addressing deficiencies

controls.control_objective: To ensure be able to proceed against the guarantor even without exhausting the remedies against the principal debtor
controls.control_description:
(2) When a default happens in making payment / repayment by the principal
debtor, an AIFI shall be able to proceed against the guarantor even without
exhausting the remedies against the principal debtor.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be able to proceed against the guarantor even without exhausting the remedies against the principal debtor

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be considered for classification as a wilful defaulter by following the mechanism as set out in paragraphs 5 and 6
controls.control_description:
(4) In case the said guarantor refuses to comply with the demand made by the
AIFI, such guarantor shall also be considered for classification as a wilful defaulter by
following the mechanism as set out in Paragraphs 5 and 6.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be considered for classification as a wilful defaulter by following the mechanism as set out in paragraphs 5 and 6

controls.control_objective: To ensure consider the track record of the individual company, with reference to its repayment performance to the aifi
controls.control_description:
(5) While dealing with the wilful default of a single borrowing company in a Group,
an AIFI shall consider the track record of the individual company, with reference to its
repayment performance to the AIFI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consider the track record of the individual company, with reference to its repayment performance to the aifi

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be considered for classification as willful defaulter by following the mechanism set out in paragraphs 5 and 6
controls.control_description:
In cases where guarantees furnished by the
companies within the Group on behalf of the wilfully defaulting units are not honoured
when invoked by the AIFI, such Group companies should also be considered for
classification as willful defaulter by following the mechanism set out in Paragraphs 5
and 6.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be considered for classification as willful defaulter by following the mechanism set out in paragraphs 5 and 6

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit information in annex i to all credit information companies (cics) in respect of the large defaulters at monthly intervals:
controls.control_description:
Reporting and Dissemination of Credit Information on Large Defaulters
(1) An AIFI shall submit information in Annex I to all credit information companies
(CICs) in respect of the large defaulters at monthly intervals:
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit information in annex i to all credit information companies (cics) in respect of the large defaulters at monthly intervals:

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be included
controls.control_description:
(2) For calculating the threshold of ₹1 crore, the unapplied interest, if any, shall
also be included.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be included

controls.control_objective: To ensure relate to the amount for which the suits have been filed
controls.control_description:
In the case of suit-filed accounts, the threshold shall relate to the
amount for which the suits have been filed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to relate to the amount for which the suits have been filed

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit at monthly intervals, information in annex ii to all credit information companies in respect of the wilful defaulters:
controls.control_description:
Reporting and Dissemination of Credit Information on Wilful Defaulters
(1) An AIFI shall submit at monthly intervals, information in Annex II to all credit
information companies in respect of the wilful defaulters:
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit at monthly intervals, information in annex ii to all credit information companies in respect of the wilful defaulters:

controls.control_objective: To ensure inform all credit information companies the removal of the name of the wilful defaulter from the lwd, promptly and not later than thirty days, from the date when the outstanding amount falls below the threshold of ₹25 lakh or as notified by reserve bank of india from time to time
controls.control_description:
(ii) a LWD in respect of non-suit filed accounts
(2) The AIFI shall inform all credit information companies the removal of the name
of the wilful defaulter from the LWD, promptly and not later than thirty days, from the
date when the outstanding amount falls below the threshold of ₹25 lakh or as notified
by Reserve Bank of India from time to time, subject to Paragraph 13(2).
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to inform all credit information companies the removal of the name of the wilful defaulter from the lwd, promptly and not later than thirty days, from the date when the outstanding amount falls below the threshold of ₹25 lakh or as notified by reserve bank of india from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported
controls.control_description:
(3) Cases of wilful defaults at overseas branches of an AIFI shall be reported, if
such disclosure is not prohibited under the laws of the host country.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported

controls.control_objective: To ensure be removed from the lwd only when the borrower has fully paid the compromise amount
controls.control_description:
Treatment of compromise settlements
(1) Any account included in LWD, where the AIFI has entered into a compromise
settlement with the borrower, shall be removed from the LWD only when the borrower
has fully paid the compromise amount.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be removed from the lwd only when the borrower has fully paid the compromise amount

controls.control_objective: To ensure be removed from the lwd even if the outstanding amount becomes less than the <image> threshold of ₹25 lakh or as notified by reserve bank of india fro
controls.control_description:
(2) Till such time as only part payment is made, name of the borrower shall not be
removed from the LWD even if the outstanding amount becomes less than the
<image>
threshold of ₹25 lakh or as notified by Reserve Bank of India from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be removed from the lwd even if the outstanding amount becomes less than the <image> threshold of ₹25 lakh or as notified by reserve bank of india fro

controls.control_objective: To ensure satisfy the requirements contained in the reserve bank of india (all india financial institutions - resolution of stressed assets) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
(3) The compromise settlement with the wilful defaulter shall satisfy the
requirements contained in the Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial Institutions
- Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to satisfy the requirements contained in the reserve bank of india (all india financial institutions - resolution of stressed assets) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure be with reference to the revised amount
controls.control_description:
(4) In cases where an AIFI decides to cancel a compromise settlement due to
non-adherence to the terms of the settlement and revises the amount payable by the
borrower, the reporting shall be with reference to the revised amount.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be with reference to the revised amount

controls.control_objective: To ensure internally conduct a comprehensive investigation from a wilful default perspective
controls.control_description:
Treatment of defaulted loans transferred
(1) Before transferring a defaulted loan with outstanding of ₹25 lakh and above,
irrespective of its classification as NPA, to other transferees, an AIFI shall internally
conduct a comprehensive investigation from a wilful default perspective.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to internally conduct a comprehensive investigation from a wilful default perspective

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure a thorough examination of wilful default aspects for each defaulted loan
controls.control_description:
This process
need not necessarily involve a two-stage committee but should ensure a thorough
examination of wilful default aspects for each defaulted loan.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure a thorough examination of wilful default aspects for each defaulted loan

controls.control_objective: To ensure complete the process of classification of the borrower as wilful defaulter as per mechanism set out in paragraph 5, and report it in the lwd to credit
controls.control_description:
(2) In a case where wilful default is observed, the AIFI shall complete the process
of classification of the borrower as wilful defaulter as per mechanism set out in
Paragraph 5, and report it in the LWD to credit information companies, before
transferring the asset to the transferee(s).
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to complete the process of classification of the borrower as wilful defaulter as per mechanism set out in paragraph 5, and report it in the lwd to credit

controls.control_objective: To ensure be responsible for reporting it to the credit information companies thereafter
controls.control_description:
(3) The details of the reporting done must be conveyed to the transferee(s), and
they shall be responsible for reporting it to the credit information companies
thereafter.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be responsible for reporting it to the credit information companies thereafter

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as recovery for the purpose of calculating the threshold limit for classification as wilful defaulter and reporting to credit information c
controls.control_description:
(4) Transfer of the defaulted loan shall not be treated as recovery for the purpose
of calculating the threshold limit for classification as wilful defaulter and reporting to
credit information companies, as the loan amount is not yet fully recovered.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be treated as recovery for the purpose of calculating the threshold limit for classification as wilful defaulter and reporting to credit information c

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to report the account as a wilful defaulter until the balance remaining to be recovered in their account plus the amount written off by the transferor falls below the threshold of ₹25 lakh or as notified by reserve bank of india from time to time
controls.control_description:
(5) An AIFI, which is a transferee in case of a loan in which wilful default has been
observed, shall continue to report the account as a wilful defaulter until the balance
remaining to be recovered in their account plus the amount written off by the
transferor falls below the threshold of ₹25 lakh or as notified by Reserve Bank of India
from time to time, subject to the provisions contained in Paragraph 13.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to continue to report the account as a wilful defaulter until the balance remaining to be recovered in their account plus the amount written off by the transferor falls below the threshold of ₹25 lakh or as notified by reserve bank of india from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure be removed from the lwd after implementation of the resolution plan under ibc or the reserve bank of india (all india financial institutions - resolut
controls.control_description:
Treatment of accounts where resolution is done under Insolvency and
Bankruptcy Code (IBC) / resolution framework Directions issued by the
Reserve Bank
(1) In case an account which is included in LWD and has subsequently undergone
liquidation or where the resolution [either under IBC or under the Reserve Bank of
India (All India Financial Institutions - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions,
2025] results in a change in the management and control of the entity / business
enterprise, the name of such a borrower or guarantor who were classified as wilful
defaulter [which includes in case of a company, its promoters and the director (s),
and in case of entity (other than companies), persons who are in charge and
responsible for the management of the affairs of the entity], shall be removed from
the LWD after implementation of the resolution plan under IBC or the Reserve Bank
of India (All India Financial Institutions - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions,
2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be removed from the lwd after implementation of the resolution plan under ibc or the reserve bank of india (all india financial institutions - resolut

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to such entities / business enterprises after implementation of the resolution plan involving change in ownership, under the ibc or the
controls.control_description:
(2) The penal measures as detailed in Paragraph 7(3) shall not be applicable to
such entities / business enterprises after implementation of the resolution plan
involving change in ownership, under the IBC or the resolution framework Directions
issued by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to such entities / business enterprises after implementation of the resolution plan involving change in ownership, under the ibc or the

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean any of the following directions:
controls.control_description:
Explanation: The resolution framework Directions issued by the Reserve Bank shall
mean any of the following Directions:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean any of the following directions:

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure the accuracy of the particulars of the directors, and wherever possible, by cross-checking with the database maintained by the registrar of com
controls.control_description:
(2) An AIFI, while furnishing information to credit information companies, shall
ensure the accuracy of the particulars of the directors, and wherever possible, by
cross-checking with the database maintained by the Registrar of Companies.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure the accuracy of the particulars of the directors, and wherever possible, by cross-checking with the database maintained by the registrar of com

controls.control_objective: To ensure report to credit information companies the details of guarantors who have failed to honour the commitments thereunder when invoked, as large defaulter
controls.control_description:
Reporting of Guarantors
An AIFI shall report to credit information companies the details of guarantors who
have failed to honour the commitments thereunder when invoked, as large defaulters
/ wilful defaulters, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report to credit information companies the details of guarantors who have failed to honour the commitments thereunder when invoked, as large defaulter

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported as per annex i and ii
controls.control_description:
The details shall be reported as per Annex I
and II
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported as per annex i and ii

controls.control_objective: To ensure also report in the director column of annex i and ii, the full names of the directors to facilitate better identity of persons concerned
controls.control_description:
Reporting of Directors
(1) In case of business enterprises registered as companies under the Companies
Act, 2013, an AIFI shall also report in the Director column of Annex I and II, the full
names of the directors to facilitate better identity of persons concerned, subject to the
provisions of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to also report in the director column of annex i and ii, the full names of the directors to facilitate better identity of persons concerned

controls.control_objective: To ensure include the director identification number (din) as one of the fields in the data submitted in annex i and ii, by them to credit information companies
controls.control_description:
(2) To ensure that directors are correctly identified and in no case, persons whose
names appear to be similar to the names of directors appearing in the LWD are
wrongfully denied credit facilities on such grounds, the AIFI shall include the Director
Identification Number (DIN) as one of the fields in the data submitted in Annex I and
II, by them to credit information companies.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include the director identification number (din) as one of the fields in the data submitted in annex i and ii, by them to credit information companies

controls.control_objective: To ensure verify as to whether the name of any of the directors of a company / guarantors / persons in charge of the management of affairs of the entity appears
controls.control_description:
(i) While carrying out the credit appraisal, an AIFI shall verify as to whether the
name of any of the directors of a company / guarantors / persons in charge of the
management of affairs of the entity appears in the list of large defaulters / LWD by
way of reference to DIN / PAN, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to verify as to whether the name of any of the directors of a company / guarantors / persons in charge of the management of affairs of the entity appears

controls.control_objective: To ensure use independent sources for confirmation of the identity of directors rather than seeking a declaration from the borrowing company
controls.control_description:
(ii) In case of any doubt arising on account of identical names, the AIFI shall use
independent sources for confirmation of the identity of directors rather than seeking
a declaration from the borrowing company.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to use independent sources for confirmation of the identity of directors rather than seeking a declaration from the borrowing company

controls.control_objective: To ensure closely monitor the end-use of funds and obtain certificates from borrowers certifying that the funds have been utilised for the purpose for which the
controls.control_description:
(i) An AIFI shall closely monitor the end-use of funds and obtain certificates from
borrowers certifying that the funds have been utilised for the purpose for which
they were obtained.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to closely monitor the end-use of funds and obtain certificates from borrowers certifying that the funds have been utilised for the purpose for which the

controls.control_objective: To ensure consider initiating appropriate legal proceedings, including criminal proceedings wherever necessary, against the borrowers
controls.control_description:
In case of the wrong certification by the borrowers, the AIFI
shall consider initiating appropriate legal proceedings, including criminal
proceedings wherever necessary, against the borrowers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consider initiating appropriate legal proceedings, including criminal proceedings wherever necessary, against the borrowers

controls.control_objective: To ensure form a part of its loan policy document
controls.control_description:
(ii) The requirements and related appropriate measures in ensuring the end-use
of funds by an AIFI shall form a part of its loan policy document.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to form a part of its loan policy document

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure end use of funds by, inter alia, obtaining certification from the chartered accountants for the purpose
controls.control_description:
(iii) In cases of project financing, an AIFI should ensure end use of funds by, inter
alia, obtaining certification from the Chartered Accountants for the purpose.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure end use of funds by, inter alia, obtaining certification from the chartered accountants for the purpose

controls.control_objective: To ensure , however, not just depend on the certificates issued by the chartered accountants but also strengthen their credit risk management system and interna
controls.control_description:
The
AIFI must, however, not just depend on the certificates issued by the Chartered
Accountants but also strengthen their credit risk management system and internal
controls to enhance the quality of their loan portfolio.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , however, not just depend on the certificates issued by the chartered accountants but also strengthen their credit risk management system and interna

controls.control_objective: To ensure be supplemented by 'due diligence' on the part of the aifi itself, and to the extent possible, such loans must be limited only to those borrowers whos
controls.control_description:
Further, in all cases,
especially in the case of short-term corporate / clean loans, such an approach must
be supplemented by 'due diligence' on the part of the AIFI itself, and to the extent
possible, such loans must be limited only to those borrowers whose integrity and
reliability are above board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be supplemented by 'due diligence' on the part of the aifi itself, and to the extent possible, such loans must be limited only to those borrowers whos

controls.control_objective: To ensure consider lodging a formal complaint against the statutory auditors of the borrowers with the national financial reporting authority (nfra) / institute
controls.control_description:
Role of Statutory Auditors
(1) In case any falsification of accounts on the part of the borrowers is observed
by an AIFI, and the auditors are found to be negligent or deficient in conducting the
audit, the AIFI shall consider lodging a formal complaint against the statutory auditors
of the borrowers with the National Financial Reporting Authority (NFRA) / Institute of
Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) to enable them to examine and fix
accountability of the auditor.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consider lodging a formal complaint against the statutory auditors of the borrowers with the national financial reporting authority (nfra) / institute

controls.control_objective: To ensure be forwarded to the reserve bank (department of supervision, central office) and indian banks' association (iba)
controls.control_description:
(2) Pending disciplinary action by NFRA / ICAI, the complaints shall be forwarded
to the Reserve Bank (Department of Supervision, Central Office) and Indian Banks'
Association (IBA).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be forwarded to the reserve bank (department of supervision, central office) and indian banks' association (iba)

controls.control_objective: To ensure satisfy itself of the involvement of concerned auditors and also provide them with an opportunity of being heard
controls.control_description:
Before reporting to the Reserve Bank and IBA, an AIFI shall satisfy
itself of the involvement of concerned auditors and also provide them with an
opportunity of being heard.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to satisfy itself of the involvement of concerned auditors and also provide them with an opportunity of being heard

controls.control_objective: To ensure be suitably recorded
controls.control_description:
In this regard, the AIFI should follow normal procedures
and processes, which shall be suitably recorded.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be suitably recorded

controls.control_objective: To ensure , in turn, prepare a caution list of such auditors for circulation among the lenders, who shall consider this aspect before assigning any work to them
controls.control_description:
(3) Based on such information received from a AIFI, IBA shall, in turn, prepare a
caution list of such auditors for circulation among the lenders, who shall consider this
aspect before assigning any work to them.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , in turn, prepare a caution list of such auditors for circulation among the lenders, who shall consider this aspect before assigning any work to them

controls.control_objective: To ensure award a separate mandate to the auditors for the purpose
controls.control_description:
(4) With a view to monitoring the end-use of funds, if the AIFI desires a specific
certification from the borrowers' auditors regarding diversion / siphoning of funds by
the borrowers, the AIFI should award a separate mandate to the auditors for the
purpose.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to award a separate mandate to the auditors for the purpose

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that appropriate covenants in the loan agreements are incorporated to enable the award of such a mandate by the aifi to the auditor
controls.control_description:
To facilitate such certification by the auditors, the AIFI shall ensure that
appropriate covenants in the loan agreements are incorporated to enable the award
of such a mandate by the AIFI to the auditor.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that appropriate covenants in the loan agreements are incorporated to enable the award of such a mandate by the aifi to the auditor

controls.control_objective: To ensure consider commissioning a forensic audit of the affairs of the borrowers and their books of accounts, in respect of accounts with an outstanding above
controls.control_description:
(6) Depending upon the nature of the borrowers' acts underlying the wilful default
and the quality of evidence available with the AIFI in the normal course, an AIFI shall
consider commissioning a forensic audit of the affairs of the borrowers and their
books of accounts, in respect of accounts with an outstanding above a threshold fixed
by the board approved policy of the AIFI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consider commissioning a forensic audit of the affairs of the borrowers and their books of accounts, in respect of accounts with an outstanding above

controls.control_objective: To ensure be some accountability for the third parties engaged by an aifi
controls.control_description:
Role of third parties
(1) As prescribed in the Reserve Bank of India (Fraud Risk Management in
Commercial Banks (including Regional Rural Banks) and All India Financial
Institutions) Directions, 2024 (as updated from time to time), in case of wilful defaults
also there should be some accountability for the third parties engaged by an AIFI, if
they have played a vital role in credit sanction / disbursement and are found negligent
or deficient in their work or have facilitated the wilful default by the borrower.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be some accountability for the third parties engaged by an aifi

controls.control_objective: To ensure forward the details of these third parties to the indian banks' association (iba) for records, regardless of the membership status of the aifi with th
controls.control_description:
(2) An AIFI shall forward the details of these third parties to the Indian Banks'
Association (IBA) for records, regardless of the membership status of the AIFI with
the IBA.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to forward the details of these third parties to the indian banks' association (iba) for records, regardless of the membership status of the aifi with th

controls.control_objective: To ensure , in turn, prepare caution lists of such third parties and circulate to all the regulated entities of reserve bank who shall consider this aspect befo
controls.control_description:
Based on such information, IBA shall, in turn, prepare caution lists of such
third parties and circulate to all the regulated entities of Reserve Bank who shall
consider this aspect before assigning any work to them.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , in turn, prepare caution lists of such third parties and circulate to all the regulated entities of reserve bank who shall consider this aspect befo

controls.control_objective: To ensure satisfy itself of the involvement of concerned third parties and also provide them with an opportunity of being heard
controls.control_description:
(3) Before reporting to IBA, an AIFI shall satisfy itself of the involvement of
concerned third parties and also provide them with an opportunity of being heard.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to satisfy itself of the involvement of concerned third parties and also provide them with an opportunity of being heard

controls.control_objective: To ensure follow due process, which shall be suitably recorded
controls.control_description:
In
this regard, an AIFI shall follow due process, which shall be suitably recorded.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to follow due process, which shall be suitably recorded

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The directions,
instructions and guidelines already repealed vide any of the directions, instructions,
and guidelines listed in the above notification shall continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
(2) Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been
taken, or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall
continue to be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or acknowledgments
granted under these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: i
controls.control_description:
Further, the repeal of these directions, instructions, or guidelines shall not in any way
prejudicially affect:
i.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and
any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be
imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
Application of other laws not barred
(1) The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation
of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being
in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
Interpretations
(1) For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the Reserve Bank may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
<image>
clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any
provision of these Directions given by the Reserve Bank shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding

controls.control_objective: To ensure be filled as 'jan24' 2
controls.control_description:
Reporting Cycle
Alpha Numeric
5 Month for which the data is reported
The reporting cycle data for month of January 2024, should be filled as 'JAN24' 2.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be filled as 'jan24' 2

controls.control_description:
Member ID Alpha Numeric
10 The field is required to include Reporting Member Code as assigned by CICs.

controls.control_description:
Member Name
Character 200 Name of the member
Must contain the name of the member who is reporting the data.

controls.control_description:
Member Branch
Character 30 Branch name of the member
Name of the branch should be fed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be fed

Borrower Name
Alpha Numeric
1000 Minimum length of the Name should be 2 characters for individual borrowers and 4 characters for non- individual.

Borrower PAN
Alpha Numeric
Permanent Account Number (PAN) as defined by the Income
10 Must be 10 characters.

controls.control_description: The first five characters must be letters, followed by four numbers, and followed by a letter.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be letters, followed by four numbers, and followed by a letter

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a numeric value outstanding amount in ₹ lakh (rounded- off) 10
controls.control_description:
Outstanding Amount
Numeric 8 Should be a Numeric Value
Outstanding amount in ₹ lakh (rounded- off)
10.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a numeric value outstanding amount in ₹ lakh (rounded- off) 10

controls.control_description: The date of classification 'march 2000' should be filled up as 'MAR00'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be filled up as 'mar00'

controls.control_objective: To ensure be fed in abbreviated form e
controls.control_description: Other Member Character 1000 The names may be fed in abbreviated form e.g., BOB for Bank of Baroda, SBI for State Bank of India etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be fed in abbreviated form e

controls.control_objective: To ensure be indicated
controls.control_description: The names of other lenders from whom the borrower has availed credit facility should be indicated.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be indicated

controls.control_objective: To ensure be 2 characters name of director/promoter
controls.control_description:
Director/ Promoter Name
Character 1000 Minimum length of name should be 2 characters
Name of Director/Promoter.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be 2 characters name of director/promoter

controls.control_description:
Director/ Promoter DIN
Alpha Numeric 8 DIN Number length should be 8
DIN of the Director/ Promoter.

controls.control_description:
Director/ Promoter PAN
Alpha Numeric 10 Must be a minimum of 10 characters.

controls.control_objective: To ensure be letters, followed by four pan of the director/promoter
controls.control_description:
The first five characters must be letters, followed by four
PAN of the Director/Promoter.

Guarantor Name Character 1000 Minimum length of name should be 2 characters

controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a minimum of 10 characters

controls.control_description:
Reporting Cycle
Alpha Numeric
5 Month for which the data is reported
The reporting cycle data for month of January 2024, should be filled as 'JAN24'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be filled as 'jan24'

controls.control_objective: To ensure to include reporting member code as assigned by cics
controls.control_description: 10 The field is required to include Reporting Member Code as assigned by CICs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to include reporting member code as assigned by cics

controls.control_objective: To ensure contain the name of the member who is reporting the data
controls.control_description:
Member Name
Character 200 Name of member Must contain the name of the member who is reporting the data.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to contain the name of the member who is reporting the data

controls.control_description:
Borrower PAN
Alpha Numeric
Permanent Account Number (PAN) as defined by the Income Tax Department
10 Must be 10 characters.

controls.control_description:
Outstanding Amount
Numeric 8 Should be a Numeric Value
Outstanding amount in ₹lakh (Rounded off)
10.

controls.control_objective: To ensure be fed the names of other lenders from whom the borrower has availed credit facility should be indicated
controls.control_description:
Other Member
Character 1000 The names may be fed
The names of other lenders from whom the borrower has availed credit facility should be indicated.
